name: loom_sync
description: Sync Loom-side artifacts into the Forge build. With --regenerate, re-emits skin.css from current loom-tokens token values. Use this after editing loom-tokens/src/skin.css or token-variable definitions and you need the consuming site (via Forge) to pick up the change. Note: per task #144, until the chronic gate is closed, this may require a commit-push-repin cycle from Loom unless the local [patch] override is active.

regenerate.description: Regenerate skin.css from current token-variable definitions.
